title: PMMO Crystals
body:
The mod is made to facilitate the [Project MMO](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-mmo) and depends on it.

PMMO Crystal adds 189 crystals for all skills from the Project MMO mod with 9 levels. Everyone gives experience according to their skill in the amount specified in the config.

By default:
- Level 1 - 100 exp
- Level 2 - 200 exp
- Level 3 - 300 exp
- Level 4 - 400 exp
- Level 5 - 500 exp
- Level 6 - 600 exp
- Level 7 - 700 exp
- Level 8 - 800 exp
- Level 9 - 900 exp

Also in the config there is an item enabling which, when using the crystal, all stack will be used,

there is also a function that does not allow the use of the crystal if the player has an exp less than the crystal 

Crystals can be found in loot chests. There is no limit on the number of crystals.

The mod may appeal to people tired of the torment mod [Project MMO](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-mmo).

https://blatfan.carrd.co/
